items.title: Deterministic Denominator Design for Localized Tamed Stochastic-Gradient Langevin Dynamics
items.summary: arXiv:2606.10559v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Tamed stochastic-gradient Langevin dynamics (SGLD) stabilizes large drifts by adding a denominator to the update. If this denominator uses the same stochastic-gradient sample as the update step, it can also change the conditional mean drift. We study deterministic denominators: the state-dependent envelope...
